title: PocialJ's Small Handhelds
description: Compact Items Utility is a performance-focused resource pack designed for competitive players who need maximum visibility without sacrificing the "vanilla" feel.
body:
# Compact Items Utility
### *Clearer Vision. Better PvP.*

**Compact Items Utility** is a performance-focused resource pack designed for competitive players who need maximum visibility without sacrificing the "vanilla" feel. By streamlining item models and lowering obstructive blocks, this pack gives you the split-second advantage needed in **Crystal PvP, Bedwars, and Skywars.**

---

### ✨ **Key Features**

* **Small Items:** Reduced scale for all held items (Swords, Totems, Crystals, Anchors) to clear up your screen.

<details>
<summary>View Small Items Showcase</summary>

![Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c65e774efb1c38bd610f6222c31a00a03c41ee6c.png)
![Axe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1faa370b8000f97bffdf72ecd9a8384e39a3b918.png)
![Pickaxe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a743b5a3cd4471b6f8136c416db14189eedc2fae.png)
![Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6777f0cd177fe1cce836c44153fc4b6664e277e9.png)
![Crystal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1bdd7fcbf6136845ad3eecf2fc439a2f8df2ecb6.png)

</details>

* **Low Fire & Shield:** Clean, 16x animated low-fire and a lowered shield position for an unobstructed field of view (FOV).

<details>
<summary>View Low Shield Showcase</summary>

![Shield](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/afca39adddfe1b5fd7c42ef7e625a7ad5e5e58a7.gif)

</details>

* **Optimized for PvP:** No useless 3D models. Just a fast, clean textures that keep your FPS high.

---

### 🛠 **Technical Details**

* **Resolution:** 16x16 (Vanilla Friendly)
* **Version:** 1.21.x (Supports older versions via "Incompatible" override)
* **Creator:** By **Pocial J**
